instructions.name: add_minter
docs: Add a minter with a quota. Requires master authority.

instructions.name: add_to_blacklist
docs: Add an address to the blacklist. SSS-2 only.

accounts.name: config
docs: Stablecoin config — must have compliance enabled

accounts.name: burner_token_account
docs: Burner's token account (burns from their own tokens)

instructions.name: freeze_account
docs: Freeze a token account. Requires master authority or pauser role.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize a new stablecoin with Token-2022 extensions.
Supports SSS-1 (minimal) and SSS-2 (compliant) via config flags.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint to be created.
We use init externally via Token-2022 CPIs to enable extensions.

instructions.name: mint_tokens
docs: Mint tokens to a recipient. Requires minter role + checks quota.

accounts.name: pause_state
docs: Pause state to check if operations are paused

instructions.name: remove_from_blacklist
docs: Remove an address from the blacklist. SSS-2 only.

accounts.name: blacklist_entry
docs: Blacklist entry PDA — will be closed (rent returned to authority)

instructions.name: remove_minter
docs: Remove a minter. Requires master authority.

instructions.name: seize
docs: Seize tokens from a frozen/blacklisted account via permanent delegate. SSS-2 only.

accounts.name: from_account
docs: Source token account (the account being seized from)

accounts.name: to_account
docs: Destination token account (treasury receiving seized tokens)

instructions.name: thaw_account
docs: Thaw a frozen token account. Requires master authority or pauser role.

instructions.name: transfer_authority
docs: Transfer master authority to a new key.

instructions.name: update_role
docs: Update a role assignment. Requires master authority.

accounts.name: config
docs: Stablecoin config (to verify compliance for SSS-2 roles)

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller does not have the required role

errors.name: NotMasterAuthority
errors.msg: Unauthorized: only master authority can perform this action

errors.name: NotMinter
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not an active minter

errors.name: NotBurner
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not a burner

errors.name: NotPauser
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not a pauser

errors.name: NotBlacklister
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not a blacklister

errors.name: NotSeizer
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not a seizer

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: Token operations are currently paused

errors.name: NotPaused
errors.msg: Token operations are not paused

errors.name: QuotaExceeded
errors.msg: Minter quota exceeded

errors.name: AlreadyBlacklisted
errors.msg: Address is already blacklisted

errors.name: NotBlacklisted
errors.msg: Address is not blacklisted

errors.name: ComplianceNotEnabled
errors.msg: Compliance features are not enabled on this stablecoin (SSS-1). Initialize with SSS-2 preset to use compliance features.

errors.name: TransferHookNotEnabled
errors.msg: Transfer hook is not enabled on this stablecoin

errors.name: PermanentDelegateNotEnabled
errors.msg: Permanent delegate is not enabled on this stablecoin

errors.name: ConfidentialTransferNotEnabled
errors.msg: Confidential Transfer is not enabled on this stablecoin (SSS-3). Initialize with enable_confidential_transfer=true.

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Invalid amount: must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidName
errors.msg: Invalid name: must be 1-32 characters

errors.name: InvalidSymbol
errors.msg: Invalid symbol: must be 1-10 characters

errors.name: InvalidUri
errors.msg: Invalid URI: must be 0-200 characters

errors.name: InvalidDecimals
errors.msg: Invalid decimals: must be 0-18

errors.name: InvalidReason
errors.msg: Invalid reason: must be 1-128 characters

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

types.name: AccountFrozen
docs: Emitted when an account is frozen

types.name: AccountThawed
docs: Emitted when an account is thawed

types.name: AddressBlacklisted
docs: Emitted when an address is blacklisted (SSS-2)

types.name: AddressUnblacklisted
docs: Emitted when an address is removed from blacklist (SSS-2)

types.name: AuthorityTransferred
docs: Emitted when master authority is transferred

types.name: BlacklistEntry
docs: Blacklist entry — one PDA per blacklisted address per mint.
O(1) lookup: the PDA either exists (blacklisted) or doesn't.
This is the key scalability design: no iteration, no lists to scan.

types.name: MinterQuota
docs: Each minter has their own PDA — no shared state bottleneck.
Enables horizontal scaling of minting operations.

fields.name: quota
docs: Maximum amount this minter can mint (lifetime)

fields.name: active
docs: Whether this minter is currently active

types.name: MinterUpdated
docs: Emitted when a minter is added/removed

types.name: PauseState
docs: Global pause state for a stablecoin.
When paused, mint/burn/transfer operations are blocked.

fields.name: last_changed_by
docs: Who last changed the pause state

fields.name: last_changed_at
docs: When the pause state was last changed

types.name: RoleConfig
docs: Stores the public keys authorized for each role.

fields.name: mint
docs: The stablecoin mint this config belongs to

fields.name: master_authority
docs: Master authority — can assign/revoke all roles

fields.name: burner
docs: Burner — can burn tokens from own account

fields.name: blacklister
docs: Blacklister — can add/remove addresses from blacklist

fields.name: seizer
docs: Seizer — can seize tokens via permanent delegate

types.name: RoleType
docs: Role types that can be updated

types.name: RoleUpdated
docs: Emitted when a role is updated

types.name: StablecoinConfig
docs: Core stablecoin configuration — created once during initialization.
Stores metadata and feature flags that determine SSS-1 vs SSS-2 behavior.

fields.name: authority
docs: Master authority — can update roles, transfer authority

fields.name: enable_permanent_delegate
docs: Whether permanent delegate extension is enabled (SSS-2)

fields.name: enable_transfer_hook
docs: Whether transfer hook extension is enabled (SSS-2)

fields.name: default_account_frozen
docs: Whether new token accounts start frozen by default (SSS-2)

fields.name: enable_confidential_transfer
docs: Whether Confidential Transfer extension is enabled (SSS-3)

types.name: StablecoinInitialized
docs: Emitted when a stablecoin is initialized

types.name: TokensSeized
docs: Emitted when tokens are seized via permanent delegate (SSS-2)
